error.cannot_connect: Povezivanje s uređajem nije uspjelo. Provjerite da li je aparat uključen i u dometu Bluetootha.
error.pairing_failed: Uparivanje nije uspjelo. Provjerite da li je aparat u načinu uparivanja i pokušajte ponovo.
error.pairing_timeout: Isteklo je vrijeme uparivanja. Uključite način uparivanja i pokušajte ponovo.

abort.no_devices_found: Nije pronađen nijedan podržani aparat za kafu

basic.title: Osnovne postavke
basic.description: Konfiguracija ispitivanja i parametara ponovnog povezivanja

data_description.poll_interval: Koliko često ispitivati aparat za ažuriranje statusa (zadano: 5 s)
data_description.reconnect_initial_delay: Početno kašnjenje prije pokušaja ponovnog povezivanja (zadano: 5 s)
data_description.reconnect_max_delay: Maksimalno kašnjenje između pokušaja ponovnog povezivanja (zadano: 300 s)
data_description.max_consecutive_errors: Broj uzastopnih grešaka ispitivanja prije prisilnog prekida veze (zadano: 3)
data_description.frame_timeout: Vremensko ograničenje za operacije slanja/primanja BLE okvira (zadano: 5 s)
data_description.auto_confirm_prompts: Automatically acknowledge soft prompts (move cup, flush). Hardware prompts (fill water, empty trays) still require manual confirmation.

advanced.title: Napredne postavke
advanced.description: Parametri BLE povezivanja (mijenjajte samo ako imate problema s povezivanjem)

data_description.ble_connect_timeout: Vremensko ograničenje za uspostavu BLE veze (zadano: 15 s)
data_description.pair_timeout: Vremensko ograničenje BLE uparivanja tokom postavljanja (zadano: 30 s)
data_description.initial_connect_delay: Čekanje prije prvog pokušaja povezivanja nakon postavljanja (zadano: 3 s)
data_description.auto_sync_clock: Automatically push HA local time to the machine on reconnect and once per day (default: on)
data_description.auto_sync_drift_minutes: Skip writing if measured drift is below this many minutes (default: 2)
data_description.auto_sync_daily_time: Daily forced sync time in 24h HH:MM format (default: 03:17)

repair.title: Repair BLE pairing
repair.description: Soft recovery: reloads the ESPHome BLE proxy that owns the scanner for this machine so the next pair attempt starts from a clean cache. Use this first. If brewing still fails afterwards, try Force re-pair (hard) — that one also wipes the bond key on the ESP, AND requires you to put the machine into pairing mode.

full_pair.title: Force full re-pair
full_pair.description:
Hard recovery: wipes the bond table on the ESPHome BLE proxy, disconnects the stuck slot, and reloads the proxy entry, forcing a fresh SMP exchange.

BEFORE pressing Submit: put the machine into pairing mode via its menu (Menu → Bluetooth → Pair new device / App-Verbindung — exact path depends on firmware). Without pairing mode the machine will reject the fresh SMP request with `auth fail reason=82`.

Requires the `clear_ble_bonds` and `disconnect_ble_peer` actions in your ESPHome proxy YAML (see esphome/ble-proxy-xiao-c6.yaml in the integration repo).

abort.repair_proxy_reloaded: Reloading the ESPHome BLE proxy now — the integration will reconnect within a minute. If you see `auth fail reason=82` in ESP logs afterwards, the bond is wedged on both sides: try Force re-pair (hard), AND put the machine into pairing mode (Menu → Bluetooth → Pair new device) so it accepts a fresh SMP exchange.
abort.repair_local_reconnect: No ESPHome proxy found for this machine — reconnecting via the local Bluetooth adapter instead. The machine should reconnect on the next advertisement.
abort.repair_failed: Recovery routine raised an unexpected exception — see Home Assistant logs for details and consider sharing them on issue #10.
abort.full_pair_done: Wiped the bond table on the ESP proxy AND reloaded the proxy entry. IMPORTANT: now put the machine into pairing mode (Menu → Bluetooth → Pair new device / App-Verbindung — exact path depends on firmware) within 1 minute. The integration will run a fresh SMP exchange and create a new bond. Subsequent reconnects won't need pairing mode again.
abort.full_pair_partial: Reloaded the ESPHome proxy entry, but bond clearing failed — see HA logs. Try again, or share logs on issue #10.
abort.full_pair_no_action: ESPHome service `esphome.{service}` is not registered, so we can't wipe the bond table. Add the `clear_ble_bonds` action to your ESPHome YAML (template at esphome/ble-proxy-xiao-c6.yaml in the integration repo), flash the proxy, and retry. We did reload the proxy entry, which evicts HA-side cache — try Soft Repair connection meanwhile.
abort.full_pair_local_only: No ESPHome proxy found for this machine — running on a local Bluetooth adapter. Full re-pair isn't applicable here; doing a local disconnect+reconnect instead.
abort.full_pair_failed: Force re-pair routine raised an unexpected exception — see Home Assistant logs and share them on issue #10.

device_not_found.message: Nije pronađen nijedan podržani aparat za kafu za ovaj poziv usluge.

brew_failed.message: Brewing failed. Check the machine status and try again.

save_failed.message: Failed to save recipe. Check the BLE connection.

no_recipe_selected.message: No recipe is currently selected. Select one or pass recipe_id explicitly.

reset_failed.message: Machine rejected the reset (NACK or timeout). This firmware may not support HD for this register.

confirm_failed.message: Machine rejected the confirmation (NACK or timeout). This firmware may not support HY.

write_failed.message: Machine rejected the parameter write (NACK or timeout). Check the brand/family, selector/slot, and parameter key.

connection_unstable.title: Unstable BLE connection
connection_unstable.description: The coffee machine disconnected {count} times in the last hour. Consider moving the ESPHome BLE proxy closer to the machine, or check for Bluetooth interference.

pairing_wedged.title: BLE pairing recovery triggered
pairing_wedged.description:
The pairing with the coffee machine ({address}) appeared wedged (the machine kept rejecting our handshake — typically shown as a red Bluetooth indicator on the machine display). The integration automatically reloaded the ESPHome BLE proxy to clear a stale cached BLEDevice.

If brewing still fails after a minute, the bond is wedged on the MACHINE side too. To fix:

1. Open the machine menu → Bluetooth → Pair new device (path may say App-Verbindung / Connect / Reset connection depending on firmware).
2. While the machine is in pairing mode, call `melitta_barista.repair_connection` (or use Settings → Devices & Services → Melitta → Configure → Force re-pair).
3. The machine creates a fresh bond; subsequent reconnects won't need pairing mode again.

If this keeps happening on every reconnect, share logs on issue #10.

clock_entity_migration.title: Legacy clock entities removed
clock_entity_migration.description: The number.MACHINE_clock and number.MACHINE_clock_send entities were removed in 0.52.0. Use the new time.MACHINE_clock entity or call the melitta_barista.sync_clock service from an automation.

sync_clock.name: Sync machine clock
sync_clock.description: Push Home Assistant's current local time to the machine RTC.
